close_reason: Implemented: switched to jrsonnet v0.5.0-pre96-test with custom Nix package
description:
Replace go-jsonnet with jrsonnet (https://github.com/CertainLach/jrsonnet) for the jsonnet toolchain. jrsonnet is a Rust implementation that is significantly faster than the Go implementation. Changes needed:
- Update nix/registry/default.nix to use jrsonnet instead of go-jsonnet
- Verify the CLI is compatible (may need minor adjustments to jsonnet_library.bzl)
- Update any documentation referencing go-jsonnet
title: Use jrsonnet (Rust) instead of go-jsonnet for jsonnet rules
